title: NuviraMC.net | German Minecraft-Network
description: NuviraMC.net Official Modpack – Enhanced Citybuild Experience
body:
> The **official NuviraMC.net Modpack** is crafted to offer players the best possible performance, visuals, and comfort while playing on one of Germany’s most popular Citybuild Minecraft servers. Built for Minecraft 1.21.9 and using the Fabric modloader, this pack focuses on lag reduction, visual clarity, and usability enhancements – without breaking the familiar vanilla gameplay feel.

**🛠️ Performance & Optimization**
Featuring top-tier performance mods like:

- Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight for rendering and game logic improvements

- EntityCulling, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast to reduce CPU/GPU load

- Marlow's Crystal Optimizer and Dynamic FPS for smooth performance even on lower-end systems

- Bobby for extended render distances without FPS drops

**🎨 Visual Improvements**

- LambDynamicLights, Iris Shaders, and high-quality texture features improve lighting and visuals

- Drip Sounds and Capacitive UI tweaks add immersive audio and cleaner interface elements

- Xaero’s Minimap & World Map for navigation and orientation across plots and cities

- **Full shader support** with Iris for advanced players

**🔧 Gameplay Enhancements & QOL**

- Litematica for blueprint-based building

- Mouse Tweaks, Shulker Box Tooltip, Not Enough Animations for smoother interactions

- NoFog, NoTelemetry, NoRealmsButton, and ChatSigningHider strip away distractions

- Ukus Armor HUD, Zoom, and Better Hurt Cam improve PvE and PvP visibility

- PacketFixer and PlaceholderAPI ensure compatibility with custom server mechanics

🎮 Server-Ready & Easy to Use
> Pre-configured and tested for NuviraMC.net, this pack allows instant connection to the server – no manual tweaks needed. Every mod is hand-picked to enhance the unique Citybuild experience without compromising stability or fairness.

*Whether you're building your dream city plot, trading rare items, or exploring with friends, the NuviraMC Modpack gives you the smoothest and most immersive way to play on the network.*
